preloadTrial.messageText: Please wait while the experiment loads. This may take a few minutes.

fullScreenTrial.prompt:
The experiment will switch to full screen mode.
Click the button to continue.

audioSetup: Click the button on the screen to start.

intro1.text1:
We have one last friend to help!
You are amazing!

intro2.text1:
I have been swimming so much. My belly is empty!
Let's go find some crabs!

intro3.text1: In this game we are going to find out what&#39s left of the word if we leave some sounds out. Listen very carefully and try to find the new word!

introNS.text2: In this block, you are going to figure out what is left of a word if we DELETE some sounds.
introNS.text3:
Listen very carefully and click on the word that is left after a sound is DELETED from
the target word at the top of your screen.

break.text1: You are doing great! I am almost ready to go out and swim! Let&#39s get a few more crabs.
break.text2: You are halfway through the block!
break.text3: Feel free to take a break.
break.text4: You can continue whenever you are ready.

end.text1:
You have helped me and all my friends! That's amazing.
Thank you so much!
end.text2: Awesome! You have completed the last block.
end.text3: Thank you for completing the Phonological Awareness activity!

ready.text1: We know what to do! Let&#39s go find those crabs!
ready.text2: Great job on those practice words!
ready.text4: Remember to listen very carefully and click on the word that is left after a sound is DELETED from the target word.

intro.text1: Are you ready to play some games with me and my friends?

intro1.text1:
Let's collect some bananas!
I am hungry

intro2.text1:
In this game we are going to look for words that BEGIN with the same sound. Listen very carefully and click on the word that STARTS with the same first sound as the word on top of your screen!

Good luck!

introNS.text1: Welcome to the Phonological Awareness activity!
introNS.text2: In this activity, you will be listening for the sounds that make up a word.
introNS.text3: This activity has three blocks where you will match the first, last, and deleted sounds.
introNS.text4: Let’s start with matching first sounds!

fsmIntroNS.text2: In this block, you will listen for words that BEGIN with the same sound.
fsmIntroNS.text3:
Listen very carefully and click on the word that has the same FIRST sound
as the target word at the top of your screen.

break.text1: Great job! So many bananas! Let&#39s get a few more!
break.text2: You are halfway through the block!
break.text3: Feel free to take a break.
break.text4: You can continue whenever you are ready.

end.text1: Yum Yum Yum! All the bananas I could dream of! Thank you!
end.text2: Awesome! You have completed the first block.
end.text3: There are two more blocks to go.
end.text4: Feel free to take a short break and return when you are ready to begin the second block.

ready.text1: You are ready! Let&#39s start the real game!
ready.text2: Great job on those practice words!
ready.text4: Remember to listen very carefully and click on the word that has the same FIRST sound as the target word.

intro1.text1: Let&#39s go help my friends now!

intro2.text1:
I would love some carrots?
Can you help me?

intro3.text1:
In this game we are going to look for words that END with the same sound. Listen very carefully and click on the word that has the same LAST sound as the word on top of your screen!

Good luck!

introNS.text2: In this block, you will listen for words that END with the same sound.
introNS.text3:
Listen very carefully and click on the word that has the same LAST sound
as the target word at the top of your screen.

break.text1:
Look at all those carrots!
Can we get a few more?
break.text2: You are halfway through the block!
break.text3: Feel free to take a break.
break.text4: You can continue whenever you are ready.

end.text1: WOW I have never seen this many carrots! I am so happy!
end.text2: Awesome! You have completed the second block.
end.text3: There is one more block to go.
end.text4: Feel free to take a short break and return when you are ready to begin the third block.

ready.text1: Enough Practice! Let&#39s start the real game!
ready.text2: Great job on those practice words!
ready.text4: Remember to listen very carefully and click on the word that has the same LAST sound as the target word.

imagesAlt.valley: background image with hills and trees
imagesAlt.leftArrowIntro: made-up word, press the left arrow key
imagesAlt.rightArrowIntro: real Word, press the Right Arrow key
